questions.question: Which dentists in Los Angeles Ca are open on weekends?
questions.answer: Dentists in Los Angeles Ca with weekend hours include: West Coast Dental of South Gate (Sat: 08:00-16:00), Vision Dental (Sat: 08:00-16:00), Relate Dental Care - Culver City (Sat: 08:00-12:00), Bedford Dental Group Cosmetic Dentistry (Sat: 08:00-15:00), Shine Pediatric Dentistry (Sat: 08:00-15:00), Rosemarie Quimson-Cruz, DMD, INC. - Los Angeles (Sat: 08:00-15:00), Choice Dental (Sat: 09:30-17:30), PhD Orthodontics (Sat: 08:00-13:00) and 24 more. 32 total with weekend availability.
